title: Monday.com Webhook api respnse more than 6 seconds
excerpt: I am creating the webhook for the particular board by using the Monday APIs; it’s working fine, but the response time of the API call is more than 6 seconds. You can find the postman screen (time is 6.79 sec) on the top …

posts.author: balanagendra (balanagendra)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am creating the webhook for the particular board by using the Monday APIs; it’s working fine, but the response time of the API call is more than 6 seconds. You can find the postman screen (time is 6.79 sec) on the top right corner.

image (60)1383×344 17.7 KB

Is there any way to get the response in less than 6 seconds?

Thanks in advance.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @balanagendra,

Thanks for reaching out! I have a few follow-up questions:

  1. Does it take this long on your machine only, or have you tested it elsewhere?
  2. Is every request taking this long?

Best,
Rachel
